description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and metallic accents. The body is streamlined with a robust polymer stock and an ergonomic pistol grip for improved handling. The upper receiver includes a metallic section with visible bolts and a barrel that extends slightly beyond the handguard, ending in a small muzzle device. The handguard is integrated into the main body, providing a sleek, compact profile suitable for urban environments. Subtle gold and silver highlights are present near the receiver and barrel, adding visual interest. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and high-strength polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban rifles.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a matte black body, metallic barrel, and ergonomic grip, accented by gold and silver highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the stock, pistol grip, metallic receiver, and barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end and the narrow profile of the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's stock, grip, and metallic receiver details, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip, with the barrel receding into the background.
